step_rationale: Antioxidant enzyme; altered activity reflects oxidative stress in inflamed plaque and dysfunctional endothelium.
mechanism: SOD catalyzes superoxide dismutation; reduced activity or expression reflects failed antioxidant defense in atherosclerotic inflammation and endothelial injury.

references.title: Enhancing Endothelial Function with Nutrient-Enriched Table Hen Eggs: A Randomized Study in Patients Recovering from Acute Coronary Syndrome.
Cigarette smoking induced oxidative stress may impair endothelial function and coronary blood flow in angiographically normal coronary arteries.
references.journal: Circulation journal : official journal of the Japanese Circulation Society

references.title: Role of oxygen free radicals in causing endothelial damage in acute myocardial infarction.
